question: Will canadian dollars drop below $0.70 usd before June 2026
reason: Forecasts indicate CAD/USD will remain above $0.70 before June 2026.
evidence: As of May 22, 2026, the USD/CAD exchange rate was 1.3811, indicating 1 CAD equals approximately $0.726 USD. ([tradingeconomics.com](https://tradingeconomics.com/canada/currency?utm_source=openai))

Analysts expect the USD/CAD exchange rate to remain near 1.36 in the short term, with gradual easing towards 1.30–1.34 through 2027. ([exchangerates.org.uk](https://www.exchangerates.org.uk/news/45852/2026-05-07-us-dollar-to-canadian-dollar-consensus-forecast-latest-survey-sees-drift-towards-1-30.html?utm_source=openai))

The Bank of Canada's April 2026 Monetary Policy Report projects average oil prices around $90 per barrel in Q2 2026, supporting the Canadian dollar. ([bankofcanada.ca](https://www.bankofcanada.ca/publications/mpr/mpr-2026-04-29/section-8/?utm_source=openai))
